summary: Iteration 9 tested the NEW freemium subscription feature (Stripe + trial + AI/documents gating) end-to-end. BACKEND: added TestSubscription class (15 tests) to /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covering GET /subscription/status shape, POST /subscription/checkout (monthly + yearly return stripe.com URL & create payment_transactions record with initiated/processed=false), invalid package_id -> 400, checkout status for unknown session -> 404, unpaid session != paid, POST /subscription/trial grants ~7d premium and blocks 2nd call with 400 (Prova gratuita già utilizzata), AI quota gating via db seed (ai_usage.count=5) returns 402 on /ai/chat, /ai/advice, /ai/chat/stream, documents upload 402 for free user then 200 after trial, premium user is NOT AI-limited (seeded count=99 -> /ai/advice with invalid pet_id returns 404 not 402). Also fixed TestDocuments.doc_user fixture to activate trial after registration (documents now gated). FRONTEND: Playwright verified crown premium-nav-button visible after login, navigates to /abbonamento; plan-monthly/plan-yearly/buy-monthly/buy-yearly/trial-card/start-trial-button all render for free user with correct amounts (€7,99 / €79,99); documents-premium-gate + documents-upgrade-button shown on PetDetail Documenti tab (upload-document-button hidden) for free users; upgrade button navigates to /abbonamento; after start-trial click, premium-active card shows and trial-card disappears; documents tab now shows upload-document-button (gate hidden). Backend suite: 97/97 pass in 82s.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py freemium logic is clean: is_premium/check_ai_quota/incr_ai_usage helpers are well-factored; _grant_premium correctly stacks days on top of an unexpired premium_until (renew-before-expiry behavior).

subscription_checkout_status auto-grants premium on 'paid' detection (poll-based) AND webhook does the same with a 'processed' idempotency flag — good belt-and-suspenders. Note both paths use the same idempotency check, so double-processing is prevented.
server.py hardcodes STRIPE_API_KEY default to 'sk_test_emergent' when env var missing — fine for dev but consider raising if missing in production to fail fast.
PREMIUM_PACKAGES is server-side only and amounts are never accepted from client (client only sends package_id). This matches the review requirement and prevents amount tampering.

server.py line 812 `items = await upcoming({"user_id": user_id})` — calls the FastAPI endpoint function with a dict instead of a user dict. Works because the endpoint only reads user['user_id']. Fragile but not a bug in current usage. Consider extracting a shared helper.
server.py file is now 1053 lines — approaching the 700-line threshold. Consider splitting subscription/AI/documents into separate routers/modules for maintainability.

PetDetail.jsx correctly branches on isPremium (from /subscription/status) to render documents-premium-gate vs upload form; Assistant.jsx correctly handles 402 on stream response with toast + navigate('/abbonamento').
Subscription.jsx polling: 6 attempts x 2s = 12s max — reasonable. Consider showing progress hint to user during polling.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (added TestSubscription with 15 tests; updated TestDocuments.doc_user fixture to activate trial for uploads)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - subscription flow end-to-end verified via Playwright (Chromium 1440x900)

test_credentials: admin@pawcare.it / admin123 (admin). Freemium test users are self-provisioned per-test via /auth/register (test_sub_*, ui_sub_*).
seed_data_creation: TestSubscription seeds db.ai_usage {user_id, date: UTC today, count: 5} for AI quota 402 test, and {count: 99} for the premium-user-not-limited assertion — avoids burning any real LLM credits for gating tests. Only 1 real LLM call happens (existing TestAI.test_advice/test_chat tests already ran and still pass).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 97 backend tests pass including the new 15 subscription tests. UI subscription flow works end-to-end (crown -> plans/trial -> premium-active -> documents unlocked). Notable: (1) checkout endpoint returns REAL stripe.com URLs and creates payment_transactions records; do NOT complete real payments in future tests — subscription_checkout_status test asserts payment_status != 'paid' for unpaid sessions. (2) AI gating tests use pymongo direct DB seed at MONGO_URL/DB_NAME from env to avoid LLM credit burn — this pattern must be kept if re-testing gating. (3) TestDocuments fixture now depends on /subscription/trial to activate premium first before uploads.
rca of the issue: N/A - no bugs found. Feature works as specified.
